Title: Extends the effectiveness of the pilot residential parking permit system in the city of Buffalo
Summary: Extends to the effectiveness of the pilot residential parking permit system in the city of Buffalo; expires December 31, 2031.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 108 of the laws of 2016, amending the vehicle and traffic law relating to authorizing a pilot residential parking permit system in the city of Buffalo, in relation to extending the effectiveness thereof
